2026.06.16.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop `cvaos.apworld` into your Archipelago install under `/lib/worlds`. To patch a ROM, drag the `.apcvaos` patch onto `ArchipelagoLauncher.exe`.

### Features
- **Library Card/Skull Key Teleport-to-start**: The Skull Key now teleports the player to the starting room (room with Mina/Hammer/Arikado).
   - Players now start with the Skull Key
- **Cutscene-skipping**: Games now start with the game-completion flag set. This should allow cutscene-skipping.

### Logic fixes
- Rooms 803 and 80D upbound were missing Hippogryph/Bat-requirement logic
2026.06.16.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.16

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.10.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install in /lib/worlds. To open patch files, drag the .cvaos file onto the ArchipelagoLauncher.exe file.

Known issues:
Item receipt potentially has some fragility (if both players play the entire time while connected to the Internet, this will likely be a non-issue).
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.10.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.10

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.11.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install in /lib/worlds.

Hotfix:
Skull Keys went to 9, preventing any more outbound check-triggering pickups from being collected.
This hotfix caps them at routinely (a future edit will have this only hit when outbound check is sent).

Known issues:
Item receipt potentially has some fragility (if both players play the entire time while connected to the Internet, this will likely be a non-issue).
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.11.title: cvaos-apworld-2026.06.11

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.11.2.description:
Second 2026.06.11 release. The in-manifest `world_version` remains 2026.06.11 — installing replaces your existing copy.

### Logic difficulty options
Execution techniques were silently treated as always doable by logic — a pixel-perfect-only route counted as reachable for everyone. They're now option-gated:

- `logic_difficulty_preset`: canonical < standard < advanced < expert (default **canonical** — developer-intended routes only). Rising tiers add kickable-enemy launches, then platform clips, then pixel-perfect platforming.
- Per-technique overrides (`kickable_enemy_logic`, `platform_clip_logic`, `pixel_perfect_logic`, `quick_save_reset_logic`), each inherit/in_logic/out_of_logic — an explicit setting beats the preset.
- Quick-save resets are never expected by any preset; they're in logic only if you opt in.

Existing YAMLs keep working: the new options default to canonical/inherit, the strictest logic. Regenerate your template to see them.

### Devil/Manticore transformation logic
Routes requiring a transformation (Tform) now expect a reachable Devil or Manticore enemy to farm a transformation soul from, instead of being free. Curly support is to-be-done from the spreadsheet. Affected today: the room-721 water routes and the Eversing pickup.

### Fixes
- Eversing was wrongly in logic with Undine alone; it now correctly requires Undine plus a transformation.
- Refreshed enemy routing data: Devil/Manticore source annotations, per-destination rows for the room-608 Devil, and Graham/Chaos reachability bookkeeping.

### Install
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater. Double-click `cvaos.apworld` to install it (or drop it into your Archipelago install's `lib/worlds` folder).
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.11.2.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.11.2

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.12.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop `cvaos.apworld` into your Archipelago install under `/lib/worlds`. To patch a ROM, drag the `.apcvaos` patch onto `ArchipelagoLauncher.exe`.

## Fix:
Deathlink was watching for HP hitting zero, which is a /very/ transient state of affairs. Outbound deathlink now more robustly checks whether the player is dying or the game-over screen is playing.
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.12.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.12

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.13.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop `cvaos.apworld` into your Archipelago install under `/lib/worlds`. To patch a ROM, drag the `.apcvaos` patch onto `ArchipelagoLauncher.exe`.

### Logic fixes
Two spots were in logic without the items they actually need:

- **Inner Quarters / Chronomage:** getting past the Chronomage now correctly requires the **Galamoth** soul (or that of Chronomage itself). Logic previously mistakenly assumed you could get through with nothing.
- **The room past Graham (Dracula's Tunic, Black Panther):** these two checks were assumed to be reachable just by getting to Graham's room (a legacy of targeting Graham initially as far as a release went). They now require being able to reach the Book souls as well.

### Under the hood
Fixed how logic ties a room's checks/enemies to its doors: they were attached to the *neighbor* side of a door, so a requirement on a door crossing didn't actually gate that room's contents (which is what let the Graham room leak). They now attach to the room's own side, so door gates apply correctly. No effect on existing seeds beyond the two fixes above.
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.13.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.13

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.13.2.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop `cvaos.apworld` into your Archipelago install under `/lib/worlds`. To patch a ROM, drag the `.apcvaos` patch onto `ArchipelagoLauncher.exe`.

## 2026.06.13
### Logic fixes
Two spots were in logic without the items they actually need:

- **Inner Quarters / Chronomage:** getting past the Chronomage now correctly requires the **Galamoth** soul (or that of Chronomage itself). Logic previously mistakenly assumed you could get through with nothing.
- **The room past Graham (Dracula's Tunic, Black Panther):** these two checks were assumed to be reachable just by getting to Graham's room (a legacy of targeting Graham initially as far as a release went). They now require being able to reach the Book souls as well.

### Under the hood
Fixed how logic ties a room's checks/enemies to its doors: they were attached to the *neighbor* side of a door, so a requirement on a door crossing didn't actually gate that room's contents (which is what let the Graham room leak). They now attach to the room's own side, so door gates apply correctly. No effect on existing seeds beyond the two fixes above.

## 2026.06.13.2
### Bugfix
Fixed issue where hard mode location access was assumed for normal mode.
### Feature
Added hard mode option.
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.13.2.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.13.2

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.17.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop `cvaos.apworld` into your Archipelago install under `/lib/worlds`. To patch a ROM, drag the `.apcvaos` patch onto `ArchipelagoLauncher.exe`.

## 2026.06.17
### Bugfixes
- **Deathlink:** Deathlink receipt now just kills you rather than resorting to 0-HP weirdness.
- **Teleports-to-home impacting Potion counts:** Teleporting to home with the Skull Key was decrementing the count of Potions (for reasons related to menu-clear). This no longer happens.
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.17.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.17

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.20.5.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install under /lib/worlds. To patch a ROM, drag the .apcvaos patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe.

*Note* **given the size of this patch, for larger AP runs it's soft-recommended to use the last release (https://github.com/anonymous-heap/Archipelago/releases/tag/cvaos-apworld-2026.06.17) until this comment is removed**.

## The progression-balancing update (initial)
### Features
- **Black Panther bias now available**: Have Black Panther show up in the first half of logic ~80% of the time
- **Pickup-balancing**: Have pickups in the game roughly scale with how long it takes to get to them in the vanilla game
   - Each pickup now has its own probability distribution controlling how likely it is to show up in a given place
       - This means you're on average more likely to continue getting more powerful equipment as you progress
       - This also means if you're routed through a difficult area at the beginning, you'll likely get better equipment
- **Vertical-movement abilities balancing**: Double-jump (Malphas) is now more likely to appear early on, and Hippogryph/Giant Bat are more likely to show up later
- **Ancient Books**: In the interest of prepping for there being non-default-3 souls for the good ending, Ancient Books are now part of logic for getting to Graham (and they appear roughly in the first third, second third, and pre 0.75 points of the game). They're not currently *required* to beat Graham, but it's an optional thing to go for
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.20.5.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.20.5

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.20.6.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install under /lib/worlds. To patch a ROM, drag the .apcvaos patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe.

*Note* **given the size of this patch, for larger AP runs it's soft-recommended to use the last release (https://github.com/anonymous-heap/Archipelago/releases/tag/cvaos-apworld-2026.06.17) until this comment is removed**.

## The progression-balancing update (initial)
### Features
- **Black Panther bias now available**: Have Black Panther show up in the first half of logic ~80% of the time
- **Pickup-balancing**: Have pickups in the game roughly scale with how long it takes to get to them in the vanilla game
   - Each pickup now has its own probability distribution controlling how likely it is to show up in a given place
       - This means you're on average more likely to continue getting more powerful equipment as you progress
       - This also means if you're routed through a difficult area at the beginning, you'll likely get better equipment
- **Vertical-movement abilities balancing**: Double-jump (Malphas) is now more likely to appear early on, and Hippogryph/Giant Bat are more likely to show up later
- **Ancient Books**: In the interest of prepping for there being non-default-3 souls for the good ending, Ancient Books are now part of logic for getting to Graham (and they appear roughly in the first third, second third, and pre 0.75 points of the game). They're not currently *required* to beat Graham, but it's an optional thing to go for
### Fixes
- **20A->209 Black Panther Option**: Removed (corrected) Black Panther as a standalone option from getting from room 20A to 209
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.20.6.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.20.6

cvaos-apworld-2026.06.22.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install under /lib/worlds. To patch a ROM, drag the .apcvaos patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe.

## Bug-fixing and more progression-balancing
### Features
- **Vertical entrances no longer get a free pass**: 25 vertical entrances had erroneous reachability logic due to a flag (varying vertical portal jump) defaulting to "accepted". These were supposed to just be a flag to take a closer look for when entrance randomization happens.
- **Floor/Ceiling Breakability in Logic**: Hidden ceiling and floor entrances are now part of logic. This is trivial for ceiling entrances in the current rando (due to the Winged Skeleton acquisition at the start). For floor entrances it's also likely trivial, but technically you do need equipment to be able to bust the floor - this update guarantees you will when the time comes.
- **Pickup-balancing**: Due to a number of items entering technical progression (ceiling and floor breaking), this required updating anyway. However, there was some desire for more liberal spreads of some decent equipment early on (there was a very unlucky run yesterday). I've un-clumped some of the start-of-game pickups to try to encourage this.
cvaos-apworld-2026.06.22.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.06.22

cvaos-apworld-2026.07.02.description:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.4 or greater.

Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install under /lib/worlds. To patch a ROM, drag the .apcvaos patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe.

## Canada Day / Fourth of July Update
### Additions:
* Adds a Library-to-Forbidden-Area Button Handling option. This turns the button that unlocks the Forbidden Area from the Library into a shuffleable pickup.
* Adds friendly names to the checks (c/o @schwartzgandhi for writing and @fenrir7732 for review). 
* Adds "Oops, All Whips" and "Classicvania Movement" patch options from @Xanthus1
### Adjustments
* Adjusts the ceiling/floor-breaking pickups to be `progression_deprioritized_skip_balancing` instead of `progression_skip_balancing`
* Quadruples the drop-rates of Devil, Manticore, and Curly souls
* Enables kicking out of single jump (courtesy of Xanthus)
### Fixes
* Fixes the build issue reported by Fenrir
* Fixes the 814->80D logic error reported by Cringe
cvaos-apworld-2026.07.02.title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow Archipelago 2026.07.02

Drop cvaos.apworld into your Archipelago install under /lib/worlds. To patch a ROM, drag the .apcvaos patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe.

## Canada Day / Fourth of July Update
### Additions:
* Adds a Library-to-Forbidden-Area Button Handling option. This turns the button that unlocks the Forbidden Area from the Library into a shuffleable pickup.
* Adds friendly names to the checks (c/o @schwartzgandhi for writing and @fenrir7732 for review).
